POST.description: Sends text to UE for local Kokoro TTS synthesis with MetaHuman lip-sync

params.voice: string - voice name (Bella, Heart, Onyx, Eric)
params.emotion: string - emotion label (Neutral, Happy, Sad, Disgust, Anger, Surprise, Fear, Confident, Excited, Bored, Playful, Confused)
params.text: string - sanitized text (no newlines, underscores, or special chars)

chunking.description: Long scripts are split into chunks and sent sequentially
chunking.behavior: Frontend waits for TTS_Complete before sending next chunk

GET.description: UE notifies frontend that the avatar has begun speaking
UE notifies frontend that the avatar has finished speaking. Triggers next chunk if queued.
Float representing audio duration in seconds. Fallback timing mechanism if TTS_Started/TTS_Complete not available.
